What i mean is that what happened in arc 1 would probably have had a different outcome in other worlds. That's not what i meant about Gramona. Like Murphy for example, she still became the Divine Mother in the arc 2 world while she didn't end up being one in arc 1 after stabbing herself on the Sona-Nyl

In the example of Murphy, she never managed to escape on the ship because in this world, the captain from the town of celeste died in the dissolution event of it. Until the everything still happened like it did for normal Murphy. Just after that, she lost any hope of escape and tried to force herself into accepting the role of divine mother

Act 1 Murphy would have become act 2 Murphy, if she never managed to escape
